notes: Seed values are illustrative, drawn from mid-2026 research. VERIFY each week.
collection.yoy: EU milk collection year-on-year %, from the Milk Market Observatory.
butter/smp/cheese: EU weekly spot price in EUR/tonne. 'now' = latest, 'prev' = ~4 weeks ago.
slaughter.yoy: cow slaughter year-on-year % (negative = herd correction stalled).
feed.now/prev: a feed+energy cost index (build from feed wheat / fertiliser / Brent).
Add an indicator id to 'stale' if you could not refresh it this week.
